description: Generates outcomes from selecting items from bags. Requires frombag() to specify draws and type(permutation|combination) for ordering.

arguments.name: draws
arguments.description: One or more frombag() draw specifications

examples.expression: P = pick(B, frombag("Urn", 2), type(combination), at(4,20), view(12,16))
P = pick(B, frombag("Urn", 3), type(permutation), at(4,20), view(12,20))
